title: Total CMS Jumpstart Definition
description: Schema for defining jumpstart content generation in Total CMS

version.description: Version of the content definition format

name.description: Name of the content generation template

description.description: Description of what this template creates

collections.description: Collections to create (both default and custom)

objects.description: Specific objects to create with defined content

data.description: Object data (for image/gallery fields, use factory rule strings)

factory.description: Bulk content generation using factory importer

id.description: Specific ID for a single object (if provided, count is ignored and set to 1)

count.description: Number of objects to generate (ignored if id is provided)

data.description: Property names mapped to factory rules (overrides schema defaults)
